creator: remko@FreeBSD.org
text:
Mikhail T. wrote:

As a developer yourself, I would have expected the following information:

Verbose Dmesg, system configuration, pciconf -vl, and any other thing 
that you might find valuable to add to the report. If we need to stick
in proper scsi_da support (Which this might be) then we need to know
some more about your machine then the information you now provided.

Thanks.

--
